title: Heurkea (disambiguation)
content:
'''Heurkea''' could refer to one of the following:

*'''[[Heurkea Floating City]]''', a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] of the [[Mon Calamari system/Legends|Calamari system]]
*The '''[[New Heurkea system/Legends|New Heurkea system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] within the [[Calamari sector/Legends|Calamari sector]]

{{Disambig}}
